title: sourcing map Home Picture Frames, 8x10inch Classic Collection Simple Designed Photo Frame with High Definition Glass for Wall Mount and Table Top Display, Silver
features: Sleek Design - This picture frame features a sleek metal frame and two pieces of transparent glass, creating an elegant and minimalist aesthetic with a touch of luxury. The photo appears to have a floating effect, adding a unique dimension to it.

Superior Quality: The metal frame gives it a certain sense of the hand. The electroplating process makes it very durable and anti-corrosion, not easy to damage, and odorless. The edges are rounded to ensure the safety of people during operation.

Easy to Use: To replace a photo, simply remove the glass gently with the small screwdriver provided, place the photo on the glass, and then put it in. Cleaning the glass surface with a soft cloth can make it as bright as new. It is recommended to keep your hands dry or use gloves when replacing photos so that fingerprints are not left on them.

Versatile Application: It can be used to display photos, posters, DIY paintings, plant specimens, etc. You can put it in the living room, bedroom, or entrance cabinet to bring more beauty to your home.
Perfect Gift: Good for home decor, this frame makes an excellent gift for friends on special occasions like festivals, birthdays, and weddings.
